(Screenshot Tools)

NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

item.title: Upscayl [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Upscayl [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Upscayl
(Graphic Apps)
Free and Open Source AI Image Upscaler. Upscayl lets you enlarge and enhance low-resolution images using advanced AI algorithms. Enlarge images without losing quality.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Arduino IDE 2.x [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Arduino IDE 2.x [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arduino IDE 2.x
(Developers Apps)
The Arduino IDE 2.x is a major rewrite, sharing no code with the IDE 1.x. It is based on the Theia IDE framework and built with Electron. The backend operations such as compilation and uploading are offloaded to an arduino-cli instance running in daemon mode. This new IDE was developed with the goal of preserving the same interface and user experience of the previous major version in order to provide a frictionless upgrade.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: e2 SAT Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: e2 SAT Editor [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
e2 SAT Editor
(Utilities)
e2 SAT Editor is a satellite channel lists editor, for Enigma2, Neutrino, dreambox lists. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux, Unix-like BSD) and free to use.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:title: sudo for High Sierra [Security]
item.itunes:author: Markospoko
item.itunes:summary:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p5 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.description:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p5 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
sudo for High Sierra
(Security)
sudo version 1.9.15p5 for High Sierra
I compiled sudo for Mac's High Sierra with newer clang (I need to sometimes also use High Sierra but I found only sudo for Catalina+), it should offer ya recent security, it comes from available sources

packages here:
- sudo-1.9.*.pkg - that has the sudo command
- sudo-logsrvd-1.9.*.pkg - log server that accepts event and I/O logs from sudo

*CAREFUL*: installing sudo via this pkg overwrites /usr/bin/sudo, make a backup if you want to keep your sudo but remember that as long as you have old version, it could be a way of undesirable acts in OS because of its flaws
[read more]

item.title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow: Elevate Your Gaming Experience
The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements

GAME DOMAIN caters to a wide range of popular games, providing dedicated kernel tweaks to optimize your gaming sessions. Here are the 23 game-specific kernel tweaks that have been meticulously added:

1. PUBG Mobile (PUBGM)
2. Call of Duty: Mobile (CODM)
3. Genshin Impact
4. Free Fire
5. Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
6. Asphalt 9: Legends
7. Apex Legends Mobile
8. Arena of Valor
9. Critical Ops
10. Dead by Daylight Mobile
11. Mobile Legends: Adventure
12. Black Desert Mobile
13. Injustice 2
14. World War Heroes: WW2 FPS
15. Star Wars: Force Arena
16. Shadowgun Legends
17. Standoff 2
18. Battle Prime
19. Super Mecha Champions
20. Free Fire Max
21. PUBG Mobile Lite
22. Call of Duty: Warzone
23. Tanks A Lot! - Realtime Multiplayer Battle Arena
24. F1 Mobile Racing
25. Real Racing
26. BGMI (Battlegrounds Mobile India)
27. Arena Breakout
28. Minecraft
29. CARxSTREET
30. Diablo Immortal

GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.
[read more]

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.
[read more]

GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements
